metadata.description: Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

content.json:
# Octopus Deploy — Security & Operations
---
Real-time security and operational visibility over Octopus Deploy audit events ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.  
Use the time range picker above to adjust the analysis window.

parameters.name: Environment
parameters.query: OctopusAuditEvents_CL | where isnotempty(EnvironmentName) | summarize by EnvironmentName | sort by EnvironmentName asc
parameters.label: Environment

parameters.name: Space
parameters.query: OctopusAuditEvents_CL | summarize by SpaceId | sort by SpaceId asc
parameters.label: Space

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Environment}' == 'value::all' or EnvironmentName == '{Environment}'
| where '{Space}' == 'value::all' or SpaceId == '{Space}'
| summarize
    TotalEvents        = count(),
    TotalDeployments   = countif(EventType has 'Deployment' and EventType has 'Started'),
    ProdDeployments    = countif(EventType has 'Deployment' and EventType has 'Started' and EnvironmentName matches regex '(?i)(prod|production|prd)'),
    FailedDeployments  = countif(EventType has 'Deployment' and EventType has 'Failed'),
    UniqueUsers        = dcount(Username),
    ConfigChanges      = countif(EventType in~ (dynamic(['EnvironmentCreated','EnvironmentDeleted','VariableSetModified','DeploymentProcessModified','LifecycleModified','TeamModified'])))

OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType has 'Deployment' and EventType has 'Started'
| where '{Environment}' == 'value::all' or EnvironmentName == '{Environment}'
| summarize Deployments = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), EnvironmentName
| render timechart
content.title: Deployments Over Time by Environment

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType has 'Deployment' and EventType has 'Started'
| where '{Environment}' == 'value::all' or EnvironmentName == '{Environment}'
| summarize Deployments = count() by ProjectName
| top 15 by Deployments desc
| render barchart
content.title: Top 15 Projects by Deployments

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType has 'Deployment'
| where '{Environment}' == 'value::all' or EnvironmentName == '{Environment}'
| summarize
    Started  = countif(EventType has 'Started'),
    Succeeded= countif(EventType has 'Succeeded' or EventType has 'Completed'),
    Failed   = countif(EventType has 'Failed')
    by ProjectName
| extend SuccessRate = round(todouble(Succeeded) / todouble(Started + 0.0001) * 100, 1)
| top 20 by Started desc
| project ProjectName, Started, Succeeded, Failed, SuccessRate
| sort by Failed desc
content.title: Deployment Success / Failure by Project

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Space}' == 'value::all' or SpaceId == '{Space}'
| summarize
    TotalActions      = count(),
    Deployments       = countif(EventType has 'Deployment'),
    ConfigChanges     = countif(EventType in~ (dynamic(['EnvironmentCreated','VariableSetModified','DeploymentProcessModified','TeamModified']))),
    UniqueIPs         = dcount(IpAddress),
    LastSeen          = max(TimeGenerated)
    by Username
| sort by TotalActions desc
| top 25 by TotalActions
content.title: User Activity Summary (Top 25)

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(IpAddress)
| summarize AuthCount = count(), Users = make_set(Username, 20) by IpAddress
| sort by AuthCount desc
| top 20 by AuthCount
content.title: Top Source IPs (Auth Events)

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType has 'Deployment' and EventType has 'Started'
| where EnvironmentName matches regex '(?i)(prod|production|prd)'
| extend HourUTC = hourofday(TimeGenerated), IsWeekend = (dayofweek(TimeGenerated) == 0d or dayofweek(TimeGenerated) == 6d), IsOffHours = (hourofday(TimeGenerated) < 6 or hourofday(TimeGenerated) >= 20)
| where IsWeekend or IsOffHours
| project TimeGenerated, Username, ProjectName, EnvironmentName, HourUTC, IsWeekend
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: ⚠️ Production Deployments Outside Business Hours

content.query:
let SensitiveEventTypes = dynamic(['EnvironmentCreated','EnvironmentDeleted','VariableSetModified','DeploymentProcessModified','LifecycleCreated','LifecycleModified','LifecycleDeleted','MachineAdded','MachineDeleted','TeamModified','TeamCreated','TeamDeleted','RetentionPolicyModified']);
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType in~ (SensitiveEventTypes) or (EventType has 'Variable' and EnvironmentName matches regex '(?i)(prod|production|prd)')
| extend IsProdScope = EnvironmentName matches regex '(?i)(prod|production|prd)'
| project TimeGenerated, Username, EventType, EnvironmentName, ProjectName, IsProdScope, SpaceId
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: ⚠️ Configuration Tampering Events

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType has 'ApiKey'
| project TimeGenerated, Username, EventType, SpaceId, IpAddress
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: API Key Lifecycle Events

content.query:
OctopusAuditEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(EnvironmentName)
| extend DayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated) / 1d
| summarize Events = count() by EnvironmentName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize AvgDailyEvents = avg(Events), TotalEvents = sum(Events), PeakDay = max(Events) by EnvironmentName
| extend RiskScore = round((TotalEvents * 0.4 + PeakDay * 0.6), 0)
| sort by RiskScore desc
| top 15 by RiskScore
content.title: Environment Activity Risk Score
